offerings.name: druckenmiller_macro_regime_analysis
offerings.description: Druckenmiller-style macro regime analysis. Classifies RISK-ON/OFF/TRANSITION, 18-month forward liquidity view (Fed, M2, DXY, stablecoin flows), concentrated trade thesis with position-sizing across 98 Hyperliquid perps (crypto, equities, commodities, FX, indices). Professional-grade macro trading analysis. Req: { query: string, assets?: string, timeframe?: short|medium|long }

query.description: The macro question or market scenario to analyze (e.g. "What is the regime and best trade for a Fed pivot?")

assets.description: Optional comma-separated tickers to focus analysis on (e.g. BTC,xyz:GOLD,xyz:DXY,xyz:NVDA)

timeframe.description: Analysis horizon: short (days), medium (weeks), long (18-month forward view)
